name: Path of the Berserker
summary: Rage as pure violence — push past exhaustion into slaughter.

features.name: Frenzy
features.summary: While raging with Reckless Attack, deal extra damage dice equal to your Rage bonus.

name: College of Lore
summary: Collectors of secrets and cutting words.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.summary: Three more skill proficiencies.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.summary: Spend Bardic Inspiration to subtract from an enemy's roll.

name: Life Domain
summary: The god of the hearth-flame: preserve, mend, restore.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.summary: Your healing spells restore extra hit points.

features.name: Preserve Life
features.summary: Channel Divinity to distribute healing among the wounded.

name: Circle of the Land
summary: Magic drawn from the terrain itself.

features.name: Circle Spells
features.summary: Extra prepared spells keyed to a chosen land type.

features.name: Land's Aid
features.summary: Channel nature to conjure healing, harming flora.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.summary: Your weapon attacks crit on 19-20.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.summary: Advantage on initiative and Athletics; longer jumps.

name: Warrior of the Open Hand
summary: The perfected fist: technique over weaponry.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.summary: Flurry of Blows can topple, push or deny reactions.

name: Oath of Devotion
summary: Honesty, courage, compassion — the knight's oath.

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.summary: Channel Divinity: your weapon glows and adds CHA to hit.

features.name: Oath Spells
features.summary: Protection from Evil and Good, Shield of Faith always prepared.

name: Hunter
summary: Slayer of monsters, whatever shape they take.

features.name: Hunter's Lore
features.summary: Know the resistances and vulnerabilities of marked prey.

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.summary: Colossus Slayer or Horde Breaker: extra damage against your quarry.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.summary: Sleight of Hand or object use as a bonus action.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.summary: Climb at full speed; jump farther.

name: Draconic Sorcery
summary: A dragon's blood hums in your veins.

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.summary: Extra hit points and scaled skin (AC 10 + DEX + CHA unarmored).

name: Fiend Patron
summary: Power on loan from the lower planes.

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.summary: Temporary hit points when you drop an enemy.

features.name: Fiend Spells
features.summary: Burning Hands, Scorching Ray and worse, always prepared.

name: Evoker
summary: Fire, frost and thunder as academic disciplines.

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.summary: Copy evocation spells into your book for half cost and time.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.summary: Your damaging cantrips deal half damage even on a miss or save.
